title: Luffy's Group Pushes Upward
description: Pages 11–13 focus on luffy's group pushes upward, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as luffy's allies push up the new plateau while Pica, Doflamingo's officers, and the Birdcage turn Dressrosa into a battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's a crew- mate of our God for ya...!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Move aside. I have business with straw hat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yeah? Well, our captain doesn't have any business with a rock like you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So you'll have to make do with me instead...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: At any rate, if it isn't going to be launch- ing any more irritating punches...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat is travelling along the back of that statue!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We can't let him get to Doflamingo before we do!!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: We should be able to make it up the plateau to the Palace now!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: [...] know this is our only option now if we want to live.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: ...I'm pre- pared to face the conse- quences....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: The plan I sug- gested to you was my way of trying to take out doflamingo indirectly...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: I want to get back at him in person!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: I failed once already, but this time I'll get him for sure!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: .......!! thirteen years ago, a man I dearly cared for...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: A former chief officer of the Don- Quixote family...

summary: Luffy's Group Pushes Upward develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
